name: Castlight Health Benefits Navigation API
what_it_does: Castlight Health Benefits Navigation REST API for employer-sponsored benefits navigation, cost transparency, and care guidance. Enables AI agents to manage benefits navigation and employee benefits education for healthcare utilization optimization, handle provider search and cost transparency for high-value provider selection, access care guidance and clinical program navigation for population health management, retrieve personalized health recommendations and care gap alerts for preventive care automation, manage health program enrollment navigation for wellbeing program adoption, handle clinical condition support and chronic care navigation for condition management, access pharmacy benefit navigation and drug pricing transparency for medication management, retrieve mental health and behavioral health resource navigation for EAP utilization, manage healthcare cost estimation and procedure shopping for employee cost savings, and integrate Castlight with health plans (HDHP, PPO) and employer HRIS platforms.
use_cases: Navigating benefits from employee health advocate agents
Finding high-value providers from cost transparency agents
Identifying care gaps from preventive care agents
Guiding chronic care from condition management agents
not_for: Employers not offering employer-sponsored health benefits
Small businesses below enterprise benefits navigation threshold
best_when: An employer with employer-sponsored health benefits using Castlight wants AI agents to automate benefits navigation, provider selection, care gap outreach, cost transparency, and health program enrollment.
avoid_when: PHI BENEFITS DATA PRIVACY: Benefits navigation using health plan claims data involves PHI requiring HIPAA BAA and minimum necessary standard; automated benefits navigation analytics must not create employee individual health profiles visible to employers without proper consent and HIPAA safeguards. Castlight financial stability risk — Castlight Health went public (CSLT NYSE) in 2014 and has faced significant revenue challenges; verify current financial stability and product roadmap before long-term API integration investment. Care guidance liability — automated healthcare provider recommendations and care guidance must not constitute medical advice; Castlight navigation recommendations require clinical review and must be characterized as informational tools.

auth.notes: Castlight Health uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2008. Previously public (CSLT NYSE, 2014 IPO). Acquired by Transcarent in 2023. Benefits navigation and healthcare cost transparency. Competes with Virgin Pulse, Rally Health, and Quantum Health for benefits navigation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-employee annual subscription
pricing.notes: San Francisco. Transcarent subsidiary (acquired 2023). Founded 2008. IPO 2014. Benefits navigation and transparency. Competes with Virgin Pulse and Quantum Health.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: TRANSCARENT ACQUISITION INTEGRATION: Castlight was acquired by Transcarent in 2023; post-acquisition product integration and API roadmap may have shifted significantly; verify current API stability and Transcarent product strategy before long-term integration

PHI benefits data minimum necessary — automated benefits navigation using health plan claims PHI requires HIPAA BAA and minimum necessary standard; automated individual health profiling visible to employer HR creates HIPAA compliance risk

Care guidance unauthorized practice of medicine risk — automated provider recommendations and care guidance must be characterized as informational tools, not medical advice; clinical recommendation algorithms require clinical review and appropriate disclaimers
No webhooks — care gap and benefits alert notifications require polling; no native push for care gap identification or benefits enrollment events

Health plan data integration dependency — Castlight navigation relies on health plan claims data; employers with fragmented or non-participating health plan data have significantly reduced Castlight functionality
Financial stability history — Castlight faced revenue challenges post-IPO before Transcarent acquisition; evaluate platform investment and API stability as part of Transcarent ecosystem
agent_readiness.security_notes: Benefits navigation. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee PHI and benefits data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Benefits navigation. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee health and benefits data.
